whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports Terraform for provisioning
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports Terraform for provisioning. Customers can use the open-source terraform-aws-sagemaker-unified-studio module to deploy a SageMaker Unified Studio domain through version-controlled templates. With this launch, platform teams can bring SageMaker Unified Studio into their existing infrastructure-as-code pipelines, maintaining consistency across development,
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio hiện hỗ trợ Terraform để provisioning — Khách hàng có thể sử dụng mô-đun terraform-aws-sagemaker-unified-studio mã nguồn mở để triển khai SageMaker Unified

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 X8i instances are now available in additional regions
whats_new.description: Starting today, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) X8i instances are available in the Asia Pacific (Seoul), Asia Pacific (Malaysia) and Asia Pacific (Tokyo) regions. These instances are powered by custom Intel Xeon 6 processors available only on AWS. X8i instances are SAP-certified and deliver the highest performance and fastest memory bandwidth among comparable Intel processors in the clou
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 X8i instances hiện có sẵn ở các khu vực bổ sung — Bắt đầu từ hôm nay, Amazon EC2 X8i instances có sẵn ở các khu vực Asia Pacific (Seoul), Asia Pacific (Malaysia) và Asia Pacific (Tokyo)

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts now support AMD SEV-SNP
whats_new.description: Amazon EC2 is announcing support for AMD Secure Encrypted Virtualization-Secure Nested Paging (SEV-SNP) on Dedicated Hosts, enabling customers to run their confidential computing workloads on physical servers fully dedicated to their use. Customers can allocate a Dedicated Host with SEV-SNP enabled and launch SEV-SNP instances on it. This gives customers the benefits of Dedicated Hosts for confide
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 Dedicated Hosts hiện hỗ trợ AMD SEV-SNP — Amazon EC2 công bố hỗ trợ AMD Secure Encrypted Virtualization-Secure Nested Paging (SEV-SNP) trên Dedicated Hosts, cho phép khách hàng chạy confidential computing

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports AMI versioning and auto-patching
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now gives you visibility into the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) versions running across your clusters and automatically applies security patches without disrupting your workloads. SageMaker HyperPod is purpose-built infrastructure for training and deploying foundation models at scale. Cluster administrators previously had limited insight into which AMI versions were running,
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod hiện hỗ trợ versioning AMI và auto-patching — Amazon SageMaker HyperPod giờ cho bạn thấy rõ các phiên bản Amazon Machine Image (AMI) chạy trên các cluster và tự động áp dụng security patches mà không gián đoạn

whats_new.title: AWS Config now supports 8 new resource types
whats_new.description: AWS Config now supports 8 additional AWS resource types across key services including Amazon API Gateway, Amazon EC2, and Amazon S3 Vectors. This expansion provides greater coverage over your AWS environment, enabling you to more effectively discover, assess, audit, and remediate an even broader range of resources. With this launch, if you have enabled recording for all resource types, then AWS Co
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Config hiện hỗ trợ 8 loại tài nguyên mới — AWS Config hiện hỗ trợ 8 loại tài nguyên AWS bổ sung trên các dịch vụ chính bao gồm Amazon API Gateway, Amazon EC2 và Amazon S3 Vectors

whats_new.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore increases default runtime quota limits
whats_new.description: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore has increased the default runtime quota limits, giving customers greater capacity to scale their agent-based workloads. AgentCore is the platform for developers to build, connect, and optimize AI agents. The new default limits support up to 5,000 active concurrent sessions in US East (N. Virginia) and US West (Oregon), and 2,500 in all other supported Regions. All AWS Regi
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore tăng giới hạn quota runtime mặc định — Amazon Bedrock AgentCore đã tăng giới hạn quota runtime mặc định, cho phép khách hàng mở rộng quy mô agent-based workloads của họ

whats_new.title: Amazon CloudWatch supports creating alarms from log queries
whats_new.description: Amazon CloudWatch allows you to create alarms on log data using log queries, and get alerted on anomalies without leaving your log analysis workflow. With today's launch, you can configure an alarm on log query and specify the alarm threshold directly, thereby eliminating the need to first create metric filters or custom metrics as intermediate steps. This streamlines the path to actively monitori
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon CloudWatch hỗ trợ tạo alarm từ log queries — Amazon CloudWatch cho phép bạn tạo alarm trên dữ liệu log bằng log queries và nhận cảnh báo về anomalies mà không cần rời khỏi log analysis workflow

whats_new.title: Amazon ECS now provides real-time deployment observability in the AWS Management Console
whats_new.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) now provides real-time deployment observability in the Amazon ECS Console. With this launch, customers can track deployment progress, monitor deployment health, and diagnose failures directly from the console, and understand exactly what is happening during a deployment, identify issues as they occur, and reduce the time it takes to troubleshoot and re
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon ECS hiện cung cấp real-time deployment observability trong AWS Management Console — Amazon ECS giờ cung cấp real-time deployment observability trong Amazon ECS Console, cho phép khách hàng theo dõi tiến trình triển khai

whats_new.title: AWS Artifact now includes Assurance Assistant for compliance inquiries
whats_new.description: AWS Artifact now includes Assurance Assistant, an AI-powered capability that generates citation-backed responses to security and compliance questions about AWS services. AWS Artifact is the service through which AWS provides compliance reports, certifications, and agreements to customers. Assurance Assistant helps third-party risk managers, compliance officers, security engineers, and auditors acc
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Artifact hiện bao gồm Assurance Assistant để truy vấn compliance — AWS Artifact hiện bao gồm Assurance Assistant, một tính năng AI-powered tạo ra các phản hồi có trích dẫn cho các câu hỏi về bảo mật và compliance của AWS

whats_new.title: AWS Partner Central now supports AWS Marketplace listings for co-selling
whats_new.description: Today, AWS announces that partners can associate one or more AWS Marketplace solutions and product listings from their AWS Marketplace catalog directly to co-sell opportunities in AWS Partner Central. Previously, opportunities required partners to use solutions specially created for co-selling, which meant partners managed their solutions for the AWS Marketplace catalog and solutions for co-sellin
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Partner Central hiện hỗ trợ AWS Marketplace listings cho co-selling — AWS công bố rằng các đối tác có thể liên kết một hoặc nhiều giải pháp AWS Marketplace từ catalog của họ trực tiếp đến các cơ hội co-sell

whats_new.title: Amazon RDS announces Cross-Region Automated Backups in four additional AWS Regions
whats_new.description: Cross-Region Automated Backup replication for Amazon RDS is now available in four additional AWS Regions. This launch allows you to setup automated backup replication between Mexico (Central) and Europe (Ireland) or US West (N. California); between Asia Pacific (Taipei) and Asia Pacific (Singapore) or Asia Pacific (Tokyo); between Asia Pacific (New Zealand) and Asia Pacific (Singapore), Asia Pacif
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon RDS công bố Cross-Region Automated Backups ở bốn khu vực AWS bổ sung — Cross-Region Automated Backup replication cho Amazon RDS hiện có sẵn ở bốn khu vực AWS bổ sung, cho phép bạn thiết lập replication backup tự động

whats_new.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore now available in four additional AWS Regions
whats_new.description: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now available in four additional AWS Regions: Asia Pacific (Bangkok), Asia Pacific (Malaysia), Europe (Milan), and Europe (Spain). Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is the platform to build, connect, and optimize agents. It helps engineers ship agents fast with any framework and any model, connect them to enterprise systems and tools, and optimize them continuously, with securit
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore hiện có sẵn ở bốn khu vực AWS bổ sung — Amazon Bedrock AgentCore hiện có sẵn ở bốn khu vực AWS bổ sung: Asia Pacific (Bangkok), Asia Pacific (Malaysia), Europe (Milan) và Europe (Spain)

whats_new.title: Amazon ECS now supports configurable deployment circuit breaker settings
whats_new.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) now gives you more control over when a service deployment is considered failed and automatically rolled back. You can now customize deployment circuit breaker settings to match your application's startup behavior, deployment needs, and tolerance for task failures, so rollback works the way you need across different applications and environments. The EC
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon ECS hiện hỗ trợ configurable deployment circuit breaker settings — Amazon ECS giờ cho bạn kiểm soát nhiều hơn khi nào một service deployment được coi là thất bại và tự động rollback

whats_new.title: Amazon GuardDuty adds sensitive file modification threat detections
whats_new.description: Amazon GuardDuty Runtime Monitoring now includes three new threat detections that alert security teams when sensitive files are modified on Amazon EC2 instances and container workloads running on Amazon EKS or Amazon ECS. These findings help identify post-compromise attacker activities by monitoring critical system files, including configuration files, authentication settings, and system logs. Thi
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon GuardDuty thêm sensitive file modification threat detections — Amazon GuardDuty Runtime Monitoring hiện bao gồm ba threat detections mới cảnh báo cho security teams khi các file sensitive bị sửa đổi trên EC2 instances và container workloads

whats_new.title: AWS AppConfig launches managed experimentation tools for A/B testing
whats_new.description: Today, AWS announces the general availability of experimentation tools in AWS AppConfig, a new capability that enables you to run A/B tests and feature experiments without building or managing separate experimentation infrastructure. Built on 25+ years of Amazon experimentation best practices, AWS AppConfig experimentation tools use AI-driven guidance to help you build robust experiments while pro
whats_new.description_vi: AWS AppConfig ra mắt managed experimentation tools để A/B testing — AWS công bố tính khả dụng chung của experimentation tools trong AWS AppConfig, một tính năng mới cho phép bạn chạy A/B tests mà không cần xây dựng

whats_new.title: Amazon ECS Express Mode now supports custom task definitions
whats_new.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) Express Mode now supports custom task definitions, giving you the flexibility to use existing ECS application configurations and advanced task-level customizations with Express Mode’s simplified deployment experience. This also enables you to reuse task definitions from your existing CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code workflows, allowing you to
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon ECS Express Mode hiện hỗ trợ custom task definitions — Amazon ECS Express Mode hiện hỗ trợ custom task definitions, cho bạn tính linh hoạt sử dụng các cấu hình ECS ứng dụng hiện có

whats_new.title: Amazon EKS now supports Kubernetes version rollback
whats_new.description: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) now supports Kubernetes version rollback , enabling you to revert to the previous Kubernetes minor version within 7 days if any issues arise after an upgrade. This provides an additional safety net for your upgrade workflow, allowing you to validate the new version under real production conditions and rollback if needed. You can initiate a rollback us
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EKS hiện hỗ trợ Kubernetes version rollback — Amazon EKS hiện hỗ trợ Kubernetes version rollback, cho phép bạn hoàn nguyên phiên bản Kubernetes minor trong vòng 7 ngày nếu có vấn đề

whats_new.title: Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus achieves FedRAMP High and DoD IL-4/5 authorization in AWS GovCloud (US)
whats_new.description: Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus is now FedRAMP High and Department of Defense Cloud Computing Security Requirements Guide (DoD CC SRG) Impact Level (IL) 4 and 5 authorized in the AWS GovCloud (US) Regions. Federal agencies, public sector organizations, and other enterprises with FedRAMP High and DoD CC SRG IL-4/5 compliance requirements can now use Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus to mo
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus đạt FedRAMP High và DoD IL-4/5 authorization ở AWS GovCloud (US) — Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus hiện có FedRAMP High và DoD CC SRG Impact Level 4 và 5 authorization

whats_new.title: AWS Security Agent now available in Asia Pacific (Mumbai), Asia Pacific (Singapore), and South America (São Paulo)
whats_new.description: Starting today, AWS Security Agent (now part of AWS Continuum ) is available in three additional AWS Regions: Asia Pacific (Mumbai), Asia Pacific (Singapore), and South America (São Paulo). Customers in these Regions can now access core capabilities of Security Agent to proactively secure their applications throughout the development lifecycle. With this expansion, customers gain access to STRIDE-
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Security Agent hiện có sẵn ở Asia Pacific (Mumbai), Asia Pacific (Singapore) và South America (São Paulo) — Bắt đầu từ hôm nay, AWS Security Agent (giờ là phần của AWS Continuum) có sẵn ở ba khu vực AWS bổ sung

whats_new.title: Amazon RDS for Db2 now supports self-managed Active Directory
whats_new.description: Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) for Db2 now allows customers to directly join their RDS for Db2 DB instances to the domains of self-managed Microsoft Active Directory (AD). Self-managed AD can be on-premises, on AWS, or in another cloud. Customers use Kerberos as the authentication protocol to enable single sign-on for their database users. Previously, to use Kerberos authenticatio
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon RDS for Db2 hiện hỗ trợ self-managed Active Directory — Amazon RDS for Db2 hiện cho phép khách hàng trực tiếp tham gia các RDS for Db2 DB instances vào các domain của Microsoft Active Directory tự quản lý

whats_new.title: Amazon OpenSearch Service optimized for log analytics
whats_new.description: Today, Amazon OpenSearch Service introduces a new engine purpose-built for log analytics workloads, delivering up to 4x better price-performance on internal benchmarks. It combines this efficiency with the full-text search capabilities that OpenSearch is known for, so users can still run the ad hoc queries that incident investigation depends on. As log volumes grow with cloud-native architectures,
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon OpenSearch Service được tối ưu hóa cho log analytics — Amazon OpenSearch Service giới thiệu một engine mới được thiết kế đặc biệt cho log analytics workloads, cung cấp hiệu suất giá tốt hơn 4x

whats_new.title: Amazon Connect Customer now supports rule based redaction for agent screen recording
whats_new.description: Amazon Connect Customer now lets you protect sensitive information in agent screen recordings by defining rules to redact specific applications or URLs. Agent screen recording helps supervisors identify coaching opportunities, such as non-compliance with business processes by allowing them to record agents' on-screen actions during voice calls, chats, and tasks. With this feature, you can create r
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Connect Customer hiện hỗ trợ rule-based redaction cho agent screen recording — Amazon Connect Customer giờ cho phép bạn bảo vệ thông tin sensitive trong agent screen recordings bằng cách định nghĩa các rule để redact ứng dụng hoặc URL cụ thể

whats_new.title: Amazon CloudWatch Logs enriches log events with AWS resource tags
whats_new.description: Amazon CloudWatch Logs now enriches log events with resource tags, making it easier to filter, search, and analyze logs by the metadata that matters most to your organization, such as team ownership, environment, cost center, or application name, without requiring changes to your logging instrumentation. With tag enrichment, Amazon CloudWatch Logs adds resource tags directly to your log events at
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon CloudWatch Logs làm phong phú log events với AWS resource tags — Amazon CloudWatch Logs hiện làm phong phú log events với resource tags, giúp dễ dàng hơn lọc, tìm kiếm và phân tích logs theo metadata quan trọng

whats_new.title: AWS CloudFormation and CDK accelerate development feedback loops with pre-deployment validation on all stack operations
whats_new.description: AWS CloudFormation customers can now get immediate feedback on deployment errors in seconds, eliminating the need to wait through a full provision-and-rollback cycle to discover preventable failures. CloudFormation now runs pre-deployment validation on Create Stack and Update Stack operations, catching common deployment errors before resource provisioning begins. This accelerates development veloc
whats_new.description_vi: AWS CloudFormation và CDK tăng tốc feedback loops với pre-deployment validation — CloudFormation customers hiện có thể nhận được phản hồi ngay lập tức về lỗi triển khai trong vòng vài giây, loại bỏ nhu cầu chờ đợi một chu kỳ provision-and-rollback đầy đủ

whats_new.title: AWS CloudFormation and CDK express mode speeds up infrastructure deployments by up to 4x
whats_new.description: AWS CloudFormation and CDK express mode reduces deployment time by up to 4x for developers and AI agents building infrastructure, based on internal benchmarks. Express mode completes stack operations when CloudFormation confirms resource configuration is applied, rather than waiting for extended stabilization checks such as traffic readiness, region propagation, and resource cleanup. This enables
whats_new.description_vi: AWS CloudFormation và CDK express mode tăng tốc độ triển khai cơ sở hạ tầng lên tới 4x — AWS CloudFormation và CDK express mode giảm thời gian triển khai lên tới 4x cho developers và AI agents xây dựng cơ sở hạ tầng

This bulletin will be updated as more information becomes available. security.description_vi: Vấn đề với AWS-LC: thư viện cryptographic mã nguồn mở (CVE-2026-3336, CVE-2026-3337, CVE-2026-3338) — Bulletin ID: 2026-005-AWS Scope: AWS Loại nội dung: Quan trọng (cần chú ý) Ngày công bố: 2026/03/02 14:30 PM PST

security.description_vi: CVE-2026-12957 và CVE-2026-12958 - Vấn đề trong Language Servers cho AWS và Amazon Q Developer Plugins — Bulletin ID: 2026-047-AWS Scope: AWS Loại nội dung: Quan trọng (cần chú ý) Ngày công bố: 06/23/2026 09:30 AM PDT

We identified an issue where the HMAC secret key is
security.description_vi: Security Findings trong SageMaker Python SDK — Bulletin ID: 2026-004-AWS Scope: AWS Loại nội dung: Quan trọng (cần chú ý) Ngày công bố: 2026/02/02 14:30 PM PST

security.description_vi: Vấn đề với Amazon SageMaker Python SDK - Model artifact integrity verification issues (CVE-2026-8596 & CVE-2026-8597) — Bulletin ID: 2026-031-AWS Scope: AWS Loại nội dung: Quan trọng (cần chú ý) Ngày công bố: 05/14/2026 13:00 PM PDT

security.description_vi: CVE-2026-7424 - Integer Underflow trong DHCPv6 Sub-Option Parser trong FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP — Bulletin ID: 2026-022-AWS Scope: AWS Loại nội dung: Quan trọng (cần chú ý) Ngày công bố: 2026/04/29 12:20 PM PDT

blog.title: Upgrade Amazon EKS clusters with confidence using Kubernetes version rollbacks
blog.description: Learn how Kubernetes version rollbacks for Amazon EKS let you reverse cluster upgrades within seven days. This new feature provides a safety net for upgrade failures—no cluster rebuilds required—turning Kubernetes version upgrades into a reversible, low-risk operation.
blog.description_vi: Nâng cấp Amazon EKS clusters với tự tin sử dụng Kubernetes version rollbacks — Tìm hiểu cách Kubernetes version rollbacks cho Amazon EKS cho phép bạn đảo ngược cluster upgrades trong bảy ngày, cung cấp lưới an toàn cho upgrade failures

blog.title: Accelerate your infrastructure deployments by up to 4x with AWS CloudFormation Express mode
blog.description: AWS CloudFormation speeds up infrastructure deployment with Express mode, enabling AI agents and developers to receive deployment confirmation in seconds and iterate faster. Available in all commercial Regions at no additional cost.
blog.description_vi: Tăng tốc độ triển khai cơ sở hạ tầng lên tới 4x với AWS CloudFormation Express mode — AWS CloudFormation tăng tốc độ triển khai cơ sở hạ tầng với Express mode, cho phép AI agents và developers nhận xác nhận triển khai trong vòng vài giây

blog.title: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances powered by AWS Graviton5 processors are now available
blog.description: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances, powered by AWS Graviton5, are now generally available. They deliver up to 25% better compute performance than Graviton4-based instances, 5x larger cache, fastest memory of any processor instances in the cloud, and local NVMe storage options (C9gd).
blog.description_vi: Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances được cung cấp bởi AWS Graviton5 processors hiện khả dụng — Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances, được cung cấp bởi AWS Graviton5, hiện khả dụng chung, cung cấp hiệu suất compute tốt hơn 25% so với các instances dựa trên Graviton4

blog.title: Automate public TLS certificate issuance with ACME support in AWS Certificate Manager
blog.description: AWS Certificate Manager now supports the ACME protocol for public TLS certificates, enabling automated issuance and renewal through any ACMEv2-compatible client on any workload. Administrators get centralized governance, IAM-based access controls, and domain scoping, reducing operational risk as certificate lifetimes continue to reduce.
blog.description_vi: Tự động hóa issuance public TLS certificate với ACME support trong AWS Certificate Manager — AWS Certificate Manager hiện hỗ trợ ACME protocol cho public TLS certificates, cho phép issuance và renewal tự động thông qua bất kỳ ACMEv2-compatible client nào

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer for Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance for MySQL, and more (June 29, 2026)
blog.description: It has been a busy stretch on the AWS Summit circuit. At the New York City Summit, I delivered a workshop called Building AI architectures with AWS Serverless, and it was a lot of fun watching builders wire up agents and serverless services to solve real problems in a single afternoon. This week I am […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer cho Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance cho MySQL, và hơn nữa (June 29, 2026) — Đã là một giai đoạn bận rộn trên circuit AWS Summit. Tại NYC Summit, tôi đã giảng dạy một workshop về Building AI architectures with AWS Serverless

blog.title: Run isolated sandboxes with full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda introduces MicroVMs
blog.description: AWS launches a new serverless compute primitive, AWS Lambda MicroVMs. VM-level, isolated sandboxes with no shared kernel or resources between sessions. Rapid launch and resume, full lifecycle control, state preservation up to 8 hours, no infrastructure to manage.
blog.description_vi: Chạy isolated sandboxes với full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda giới thiệu MicroVMs — AWS khởi chạy một serverless compute primitive mới, AWS Lambda MicroVMs, các VM-level isolated sandboxes không có shared kernel hoặc resources giữa các session

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone in Hanoi, Grok 4.3 in Bedrock, price reductions, and more (June 22, 2026)
blog.description: Last week AWS Summit New York City brought together thousands of customers, partners, and builders for a free, one-day event showcasing the latest in cloud and AI innovation. Dr. Swami Sivasubramanian, VP of Agentic AI at AWS unveiled a stack of AI launches in his keynote, all built around one thesis: agents that compound value […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone ở Hanoi, Grok 4.3 trong Bedrock, price reductions, và hơn nữa (June 22, 2026) — Tuần trước AWS Summit New York City tập hợp hàng ngàn khách hàng, đối tác và builders cho một sự kiện miễn phí một ngày

blog.title: Announcing Amazon EC2 G7 instances accelerated by NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs
blog.description: Announcing the general availability of Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) G7 instances, delivering high performance GPU acceleration for AI inference, graphics, and data analytics workloads.
blog.description_vi: Công bố Amazon EC2 G7 instances được tăng tốc bởi NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs — Công bố tính khả dụng chung của Amazon EC2 G7 instances, cung cấp GPU acceleration hiệu suất cao cho AI inference, graphics và data analytics

blog.title: Amazon ECS introduces new high-resolution metrics for faster service auto scaling
blog.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service auto scaling automatically adjusts task counts to meet workload demand with comprehensive scaling policies, including predictive scaling for recurring traffic patterns, scheduled scaling for planned events, and target tracking to scale dynamically on real-time metrics. You can choose proactive scaling by using predictive scaling (automatic) and
blog.description_vi: Amazon ECS giới thiệu high-resolution metrics mới để nhanh hơn service auto scaling — Amazon ECS service auto scaling tự động điều chỉnh task counts để đáp ứng workload demand với các comprehensive scaling policies, bao gồm predictive scaling

blog.description: A recap of the top announcements from AWS's New York Summit 2026

incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruption. The Middle East (UAE) Region (ME-CENTRAL-1) has suffered damage as a result of the conflict in the Middle East and is currently unable to reliably support customer applications. While some workloads continue to function normally, we strongly recommend customers migrate all accessible resources to other Regions and restore inaccessible r

incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruption. The Middle East (Bahrain) Region (ME-SOUTH-1) has suffered damage due to the conflict in the Middle East and is currently unavailable. Customers should recover their resources in other Regions from remote backups. Relevant billing operations are currently suspended while we restore normal operations in this AWS Region. We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. With the immediate phase of this event now better understood, we are moving to a more targeted communication model. incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Error Rates

We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. For Amazon S3, we are seeing continued improvement in PUT and LIST availability. Newly written objects are now able to be successfully retrieved, and we continue to work on reducing GET error rates for

incidents.title: Service impact: Increased Connectivity Issues and API Error Rates

We have no change to expected timelines for fully restoring power and connectivity. While progress is being made, significant work remains before full restoration is complete.
